thesis_hint: Recent quality is improving but still fragile: last 3 visible outcomes are -0.5000 -> 3.7490 -> -0.3480, which means the inverted failed-continuation concept found real edge on ETH but is unstable and too sparse. Stay on ETH 1h and keep the v2 failed-continuation shape, but solve the trade-count problem without losing the edge. Test one lever per variant only: slightly relax the continuation-failure trigger to lift ETH trades from 8 toward 15+, require the same failed-continuation logic to block the weak BTC transfer shape, or add a time-based invalidation that exits faster when downside momentum does not confirm.
stop_condition: Stop when any variant reaches QScore >= 1.0 with profit_factor >= 1.20, total_trades >= 15, and max_drawdown_pct <= 8.0; abort any variant with total_trades < 10, profit_factor < 1.00, or max_drawdown_pct > 10.0.
